proposed_entries.title: cPanel UAPI overwrite is the path for backend deploy on GoDaddy hosting
proposed_entries.body: Direct cPanel UAPI calls (vs. interactive cPanel UI) are the working programmatic path for backend file deployment to GoDaddy hosting. Codex used this for MBSH deploy.
proposed_entries.auto_promote_reason: confidence >= 0.85 AND type 'vendor-fact' is in allowlist

proposed_entries.title: Do not mark a task blocked without re-checking when external state changes
proposed_entries.body: task-2026-05-04-028 stayed blocked in tasks.jsonl after the underlying media gap was closed by a separate session. Always re-audit blocked tasks at session start.
proposed_entries.auto_promote_reason: confidence >= 0.85 AND type 'do-not-repeat' is in allowlist
